rulings.Case Title: MCILVENNA VS THE REPUBLIC OF UKRAINE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Sept. 5, 2006 Orfer Dismissing Action Pursuant To Ccp 1008, Ccp 473(B), Ccp 663, And/Or Pursuant To The Court'S Equitable Powers, Or, Motion For New Trial
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR FRIDAY, OCTOBER 27, 2006. ASSIGNEE UNIVERSAL STRUCTURAL COMPOSITES CORPORATION'S Motion To Vacate Sept. 5, 2006 Orfer Dismissing Action Pursuant To Ccp 1008, Ccp 473(B), Ccp 663, And/Or Pursuant To The Court'S Equitable Powers, Or, Motion For New Trial IS DENIED. FAILED TO SHIFT BURDEN. 1.) SUPPLEMENTAL RENTAL DECLARATION AND JUDICIAL NOTICE REQUEST UNTIMELY. 2.0 CASES CITED NOT ON POINT. 3.) NEW EVIDENCE PROFERRED NOT ADMISSIBLE AND EVEN IF WERE NOT PROBATIVE. =(302/REQ/AP)
